narrative:
Springfield Unincorp township has 18,595 registered voters, with 57.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.0 percentage points.
